title: RFA Thanks President Trump for Supporting Summer E15, Continues Push for Legislation
content: In response to President Trumpâ€™s executive order on a national energy emergency, Renewable Fuels Association President Geoff Cooper expressed gratitude for monitoring fuel markets and potential E15 waivers but urged Congress to pass permanent legislation allowing year-round E15 sales, providing market stability and eliminating the need for emergency measures.
author: Analysts Account
